---
title: "Aspen (Populus tremula)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Populus*](/trees/genus/populus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 157 — Aspen](../157.html) |  |
